name: Stackable Laminate 2-Compartment Kids' Storage Bin White - Pillowfort™
description: This Stackable Laminate 2-Compartment Bin from Pillowfort™ is perfect for keeping a kid's bedroom, entryway or any other space in your home organized and clutter-free. This stackable bin features 2 compartments and a top shelf that holds up to 25 pounds, and the solid white color matches easily with existing home decor. Adult assembly is required for this 2-compartment bin, and all necessary tools are provided for your convenience.
